subject: English
chapter_name: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the life and achievements of Verghese Kurien
Learn about the White Revolution and its importance in India
Identify the role of cooperative societies in helping farmers
Understand how determination and vision can bring social change
Recognize the importance of teamwork and leadership
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Dreams and Achievements
topics_covered: Importance of hard work and determination
teaching_strategy: Class discussion on dreams and goals
student_activities: Write one goal they want to achieve

lesson_plan.title: Background of Verghese Kurien
teaching_strategy: Teacher narration of Kurien’s early life
Guided reading of the chapter introduction
student_activities: Read the first section of the chapter
List important events from Kurien’s early life

lesson_plan.title: Understanding the White Revolution
teaching_strategy: Discussion on milk production in India
student_activities: Discuss why dairy cooperatives help farmers
Write key points about the White Revolution

lesson_plan.title: Leadership and Vision of Verghese Kurien
student_activities: List qualities of a good leader

lesson_plan.title: Impact and Lessons from the Story
topics_covered: Success of the dairy cooperative movement
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of the story conclusion
student_activities: Write the lesson learned from Kurien’s life
Share examples of helping the community

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision Activities
topics_covered: Key facts about the White Revolution

teaching_aids: Pictures of dairy farming and milk production
teacher_tip: Explain the concept of the White Revolution using real-life examples of milk cooperatives like AMUL. This helps students understand how Verghese Kurien’s vision transformed the lives of farmers.
